title: AI ended my career, but it doesn’t have to be this way (Opinion)
description: There’s legislation currently in front of the general assembly that would demand the kind of transparency and accountability needed to protect people from artificial intelligence job screenings.
content:
I have never met Derek Mobley, a black man in California, but we have one thing in common.
AI killed our job searches.
Mobley is the guy who sued Workday, an AI hiring system used by thousands of major corporations and governments. His claim: that Wo... [4544 chars]

title: Old-school hobbies growing in popularity
description: As cellphones, social media and artificial intelligence become more prevalent in society, some Manitobans are going back to the basics with their pastimes.
content:
As cellphones, social media and artificial intelligence become more prevalent in society, some Manitobans are going back to the basics with their pastimes.

title: Poll: GOP voters skeptical of AI as Trump steams ahead
description: About 3 out of 4 Americans who voted for the president support some form of government oversight on artificial intelligence — even as the Trump administration pushes deregulation.
content: The findings reflect that the technology is a growing concern for Republicans heading into the midterm election, posing a potential obstacle to the White House’s plans to enact a federal AI framework that advances Trump’s pro-industry priorities — a ... [3179 chars]

title: AI finds signs of pancreatic cancer before tumors develop
description: An artificial intelligence model from the Mayo Clinic detected abnormalities on scans up to two years before patients were diagnosed.
content:
By the time doctors detect pancreatic cancer, it’s often too late to treat effectively. But a new study suggests that artificial intelligence might be able to find signs of the disease before tumors are visible on a scan.
An AI model developed at the... [4532 chars]

title: Oscars Draw Red Line For AI-Generated Actors, Scripts
description: The Academy of Motion Picture Arts and Sciences has moved to draw a clear line on the use of artificial intelligence in films, making it explicit that AI-generated actors and writers will not be eligible for Oscars in key categories

title: Chinese actor leaves industry after AI cuts work in micro-drama sector
description: Rapid adoption of artificial intelligence in entertainment leaves performers scrambling for livelihoods.
content: A Chinese micro-drama actor who once appeared in more than 200 short online productions has been forced to quit acting and return to farming after losing work to artificial intelligence. Zhang Xiaolei, 28, has gone back to agricultural life in Qingha... [1845 chars]
